architectural_purpose: deterministic audit-only transition integrity enforcement without remediation

classification_semantics.blocked: governance, integrity preconditions, or boundary preservation blocks certification
classification_semantics.incomplete: required domains, audit evidence, provenance, continuity, or explainability are missing
classification_semantics.integrity_failed: integrity violations are detected and remain fail-visible
classification_semantics.integrity_satisfied: all required evidence and deterministic guarantees are present with no unresolved violations
classification_semantics.integrity_warning: warnings and descriptive risks are visible while deterministic guarantees remain preserved
classification_semantics.prohibited: requested integrity audit behavior violates non-execution or non-remediation boundaries
classification_semantics.unknown: audit semantics, provenance meaning, continuity meaning, or evidence meaning is uncertain
classification_semantics.unsupported: audit domain or evidence is outside supported deterministic scope

explicit_limitations: v3.9 Phase 8 transition integrity enforcement is audit-only
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable orchestration execution
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable transition execution
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable remediation or repair
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable routing, scheduling, dispatch, or traversal
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable authorization or approval
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable recommendations
v3.9 Phase 8 does not enable ranking, scoring, or selection
v3.9 Phase 8 does not prioritize or weight violations
v3.9 Phase 8 does not mutate transition evidence
